<current_datetime>2026-05-01T01:04:31.341Z</current_datetime>

Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to build the .NET project in both Debug and Release configurations and create binary logs (binlogs) for each build. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-a866d8dfbea5425a8139de2d52a4fa2c && dotnet build -c Debug -bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG OK---" && dotnet build -c Release -bl:release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE OK---"

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. Two binary logs were created:

- **`debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build
- **`release.binlog`** — Release configuration build

You can inspect them with `dotnet build-server` or the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
